meta.title: QR Code Flyers for Restaurants — Direct Orders from Print | Gastro Master
meta.description: With the QR Code Flyer Add-On from Gastro Master, customers order directly from paper flyers. Automatic URL generation, tracking & analytics, print-ready designs. Perfect for pizzerias, delivery services & restaurants.

hero.headline: QR Code Flyer — Direct Orders from Paper Flyers
hero.subline: Turn every flyer into an ordering channel. One scan, one tap — and your customers order directly in your webshop or app. Trackable, print-ready, measurable.

problem.title: The Problem with Classic Flyers
points: Customers have to Google your restaurant first — often ending up on Lieferando & Co.
The journey from 'flyer in hand' to first order takes 3–5 minutes — too many drop-offs.
You never know which flyer, which area, which campaign actually drives revenue.
Typing URLs doesn't work anymore — flyers end up unused in the bin.

solution.title: The Solution: QR Code Flyer
points: Every flyer gets an individual QR code that leads directly to your webshop or app.
One scan — in 2 seconds the customer is in the menu, no Google detour, no platform commission.
Every scan is tracked: when, where, which campaign. You see the ROI of every flyer live.
Print-ready PDFs in your branding — send directly to the printer, done.

features.headline: Everything You Need for Flyers That Actually Generate Orders
features.sub: Six features that turn every flyer into a measurable marketing asset.

items.title: Automatic URL Generation
items.description: A unique deep-link with QR code per campaign — automatically generated, immediately ready to use.

items.title: Tracking & Analytics
items.description: Scans, orders, revenue per flyer — transparent in the dashboard. Finally know what works.

items.title: Print-Ready PDF Export
items.description: Print-ready files with 3mm bleed and CMYK colour profile — directly to the printer.

items.title: Brand Design Customisation
items.description: Logo, colours, fonts — your flyer looks agency-quality, without the agency price tag.

items.title: Mobile-Optimised Landing Page
items.description: The QR code never lands on a slow website, but directly in the streamlined ordering flow.

items.title: Campaign Codes & Discounts
items.description: Flyer promotion with 10% discount code? One click in the dashboard, active in the QR code, measurable per quantity.

useCases.headline: How Restaurateurs Use the QR Code Flyer
useCases.sub: Three real scenarios from our customer base — from the neighbourhood to the chain.

items.title: Pizzeria in a Residential Area
items.story: A Berlin pizza baker distributes 2,000 flyers with QR codes within a 3 km radius. Result: +40% direct orders in 4 weeks — without Lieferando's 13% commission.

items.title: Delivery Service Chain
items.story: A burger chain from Munich prints QR codes on every delivery package. Regular customers scan instead of Googling — reorder rate rose from 22% to 38%.

items.title: Event Marketing
items.story: A food truck in Hamburg prints QR codes on city festival flyers. The truck knows in real time: Event X brings €3 per flyer, Event Y only €0.40. Budget is reallocated accordingly.

stats.label: more direct orders with QR code flyers

testimonial.quote: Our flyers used to be a shot in the dark. With the QR code we see exactly what works per campaign — and we only reprint for the areas that perform.
testimonial.author: Marco R.

pricing.headline: Pricing & Availability
pricing.note: The QR code flyer system is included free in every webshop and app subscription. You only pay for printing — transparent by quantity, no hidden fees.
pricing.tiersNote: All prices net plus VAT. Includes printing, bleed, individual QR code and shipping within Germany. Individual quantities on request.

internalLinks.headline: Works Perfectly With
internalLinks.intro: The QR code flyer unfolds its full potential combined with your ordering channel. Both options are fully compatible with the add-on.

items.title: Webshop
items.description: Direct deep-link from the flyer to your webshop — no app download, immediately in the browser. Ideal for new customer acquisition.

items.title: Own Ordering App
items.description: QR code opens your app from the store — or the webshop if the app is not installed. Smart fallback included.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions about the QR Code Flyer
faq.sub: Answers to the questions we receive most often from restaurateurs across Germany and the DACH region.

items.q: What does a QR code flyer cost for my restaurant?
items.a: The QR code system itself is included at no extra cost in every Gastro Master webshop and app subscription. You only pay for printing by quantity: from €65 for 2,500 pieces to €1,117 for 50,000 pieces (net, plus VAT, including printing, bleed, individual QR code and shipping within Germany). Individual quantities and special formats are available on request at any time.

items.q: How does the QR code flyer work for hospitality?
items.a: We generate an individual QR code per campaign that leads directly to your Gastro Master webshop or your own ordering app — without a Google detour, without platform commission. The guest scans, lands in the menu and orders. Every scan is tracked in real time, so you can see the ROI of every individual flyer live in the dashboard.

items.q: Which cities and regions can I use QR code flyers in?
items.a: The QR code flyer works nationwide — from Berlin and Hamburg to Munich, Cologne, Frankfurt, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf and Leipzig through to smaller towns in Bavaria, NRW, Baden-Württemberg and eastern Germany. Printing and shipping are within Germany; Austria and Switzerland are available on request.

items.q: How quickly are the flyers produced and delivered?
items.a: After design approval, the standard production time is 3–5 working days, plus 1–2 days shipping within Germany. Express production is available at extra cost — for urgent campaigns (e.g. opening, special promotion) we deliver within 48 hours.

items.q: Can I connect the QR code flyer to my existing webshop?
items.a: Yes, if you already use a Gastro Master webshop or ordering app, the QR code flyer add-on is immediately ready. The codes are automatically linked to your system — no setup, no integration, no developers needed.

items.q: Do I need my own ordering app for the QR code flyer?
items.a: No, an app is not a prerequisite. The QR code can lead directly to your webshop — guests order immediately in the browser, without a download. If you also have an app, it opens automatically if installed — otherwise the webshop takes over (smart fallback).

items.q: What print quality do the flyers have?
items.a: All flyers are produced on high-quality 135 g/m² coated paper with 4/4-colour printing (Euroscale, CMYK). Standard formats: DL, A6 and A5. Special formats, heavier paper (170–300 g/m²) and finishes such as soft-touch or UV varnish are available at extra cost.

items.q: Can I use multiple different QR codes per campaign?
items.a: Yes — you can run any number of campaigns simultaneously, each with its own QR code. This lets you track separately how flyers in different areas perform, or which special promotion drives more orders. Ideal for A/B testing and geographic marketing.

items.q: Can I embed discount codes in the QR code?
items.a: Yes. Per campaign you can link a discount code (e.g. 'FLYER10' for 10% off the first order) directly to the QR code. The code is automatically applied on scan — no manual entry by the guest required. As measurable as any online campaign.

items.q: How do I make sure my flyers actually drive revenue?
items.a: In the Gastro Master dashboard you can see live per flyer campaign: number of scans, resulting orders, revenue and the effective cost-per-order. After just a few days you can see which areas, audiences or promotions perform — and order reprints only where the flyer pays off.
